examples: That's because, if ratified, it will become the decisive act in this creation of a federal European superstate with its capital in Brussels.
Even if that need not mean a superstate with its own finance ministry, the EU's leaders have not started to explain the likely ramifications of all this to voters.
He would like a loose free-trade zone instead of what he sees as a nascent superstate.
And if some do truly relish the prospect of a superstate, then this agreement lets them taste it.
